name: IIT Guwahati
tagline: Most scenic campus — strong CSE and design intake.
description: IIT Guwahati is the sixth member of the IIT fraternity established in 1994. Situated on the northern banks of the Brahmaputra river, it is surrounded by scenic hills and lush greenery.
about: IIT Guwahati is a premier engineering institute in Northeast India. Known for its beautiful riverside campus, strong research culture, and excellent placement record in software, core and finance sectors.

labs.name: VLSI Lab
labs.description: Advanced chip design and testing facility

labs.name: AI & Machine Learning Lab
labs.description: Dedicated GPU cluster for AI research

name: IIT BHU Varanasi
tagline: Ceramic + metallurgy heritage — newest IIT to scale CSE.
description: IIT (BHU) Varanasi emerged from IT-BHU, one of India's oldest technical institutions. Located within the Banaras Hindu University campus, it offers a unique academic environment.
about: IIT BHU is among India's oldest technical institutions, established in 1919 as the Benaras Engineering College. Known for metallurgy, ceramics and now rapidly growing in CSE placement.

name: NIT Trichy
tagline: Top NIT for placements — cracks the IIT-grade salary band.
description: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli is consistently ranked among the top NITs in India. Known for excellent placements and a vibrant campus culture.
about: NIT Trichy (NITT) is the premier NIT in South India. Its placement statistics rival several IITs, with CSE consistently achieving top packages from global tech companies.

name: NIT Surathkal
tagline: Beachside campus — best NIT culture for clubs and fests.
description: National Institute of Technology Karnataka, Surathkal is a premier NIT with a beautiful coastal campus. Known for technical fests, strong alumni network and excellent placements.
about: NITK Surathkal is one of the oldest NITs, situated on the scenic Surathkal beach. It has a strong focus on technology and has produced many industry leaders.

name: NIT Warangal
tagline: Heritage NIT — strongest brand recall in the south.
description: National Institute of Technology Warangal, the first NIT in India, established in 1959. Known for its rich heritage, strong alumni base and consistently high placements.
about: NIT Warangal is the oldest NIT in India and one of the most prestigious. It has an exceptional placement record and strong alumni presence in top tech companies worldwide.

name: IIT Bombay
tagline: India's premier tech institution — deepest industry network.
description: IIT Bombay is one of India's most prestigious institutions, located in the financial capital. Known for innovation, entrepreneurship and highest placements among all IITs.
about: IIT Bombay consistently ranks #1 in India for placements and industry connect. The institution has the highest number of alumni startups and the deepest industry relationships.

labs.name: CUSE Lab
labs.description: Centre for Urban Science and Engineering

name: IIT Delhi
tagline: Capital city IIT — strongest consulting and finance recruiting.
description: IIT Delhi, located in South Delhi, is one of India's top engineering institutions. Known for its urban location, strong placements in consulting and finance, and vibrant entrepreneurship culture.
about: IIT Delhi benefits from its proximity to Delhi's corporate hub. It has exceptional placements in management consulting, finance and technology sectors.

name: IIT Madras
tagline: NIRF #1 institute — India's finest research ecosystem.
description: IIT Madras consistently tops the NIRF rankings. Located in a forested campus in Chennai, it excels in research, innovation and deep tech.
about: IIT Madras is India's No.1 ranked institution by NIRF. Known for research excellence, deep tech innovation, and a unique campus with deer roaming freely in the forest.

labs.name: Robert Bosch Centre for Cyber-Physical Systems

name: NIT Calicut
tagline: Kerala's flagship NIT — consistent top-3 NIT for CSE placements.
description: National Institute of Technology Calicut is one of Kerala's premier engineering institutions. Known for a strong technical culture and exceptional placement records.
about: NIT Calicut is consistently ranked among the top NITs. Its serene campus and strong faculty make it a preferred destination for aspirants from all over India.

name: IIIT Hyderabad
tagline: Research-focused IIIT — best AI and language tech institute in India.
description: IIIT Hyderabad is a research university focused on computer science and information technology. It is known for its UGRC program and excellence in AI, NLP and computer vision.
about: IIIT-H is unique for its research-oriented BTech + MS dual degree program (UGRC). Alumni are well-placed in top AI research labs and tech companies globally.

name: DTU Delhi
tagline: Delhi's top state engineering university — unbeatable value at rank 5000+.
description: Delhi Technological University (formerly DCE) is Delhi's premier state engineering university. Known for excellent placements and vibrant campus life.
about: DTU is the go-to college for Delhi students who narrowly miss IIT/NIT cutoffs. With strong industry ties and reasonable cutoffs, it offers exceptional return on investment.

name: BITS Pilani
tagline: Best private engineering college in India — legendary Practice School.
description: BITS Pilani is India's top private engineering institution. The Practice School program gives students real industry experience while studying.
about: BITS Pilani's unique dual-degree + Practice School model has produced some of India's most successful entrepreneurs and engineers. The autonomous curriculum allows flexibility.

name: IIT Kanpur
tagline: Research powerhouse — strongest core engineering and sciences.
description: IIT Kanpur is one of India's most respected engineering institutes, known for excellent academics, advanced research opportunities, and highly experienced faculty.
about: IIT Kanpur continues to be one of the most respected engineering institutes in India. Known for its excellent academics, advanced research opportunities, and highly experienced faculty guiding students in academics and personal development.

name: IIT Kharagpur
tagline: First IIT ever — largest campus, strongest alumni network.
description: IIT Kharagpur is the first IIT ever founded. It has the largest campus among all IITs and a strong legacy in traditional engineering.
about: IIT Kharagpur is the first IIT ever founded in 1951. It has the largest campus (2,100 acres) and consistently crosses 1,700+ total offers annually. Strong in traditional engineering with excellent placement records.

name: IIT Roorkee
tagline: Oldest engineering institution in Asia — civil engineering legend.
description: IIT Roorkee is the oldest engineering institution in Asia. Known for civil engineering, earthquake engineering, and strong technical heritage.
about: IIT Roorkee is the oldest engineering institution in Asia (est. 1847). Known for civil engineering excellence, earthquake engineering, and strong placement records. NIRF Rank 6 with 99.07% CSE placement rate.

name: IIT Hyderabad
tagline: Fastest rising IIT — AI and fractal academics pioneer.
description: IIT Hyderabad is one of the fastest rising IITs. Known for its modern fractal academic system, AI focus, and sustainable 576-acre campus.
about: IIT Hyderabad (est. 2008) is the fastest rising IIT, overtaking IIT Guwahati in NIRF 2025. Known for its modern fractal academic system, AI department, sustainable campus with radiant cooling, and iTIC incubator.

labs.name: CRIAI
labs.description: Centre for Research in Artificial Intelligence

name: IIT Indore
tagline: Fastest-rising new IIT — cracked top 15 within 15 years.
description: IIT Indore is one of the fastest-rising new IITs. It has cracked the top 15 NIRF rankings within 15 years of establishment with excellent placements.
about: IIT Indore (est. 2009) is a well-known technical education institute with excellent global and national rankings. Known for strong CSE placements with 96.83% placement rate and highest package of Rs 68 LPA.

name: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad
tagline: Mining heritage meets modern tech — unique petroleum and mineral programs.
description: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is the oldest mining institute in India, established in 1926. It got IIT status in 2016 and is known for unique programs in mining, petroleum, and metallurgy.
about: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is the oldest mining institute in India (est. 1926, IIT status 2016). Known for unique programs in mining, petroleum, and metallurgy with strong placement records. 300+ companies visit for placements.

name: IIT Patna
tagline: Fastest growing new IIT — jumped 15 ranks in NIRF 2025.
description: IIT Patna is one of the leading new IITs, established in 2008. It jumped 15 ranks in NIRF 2025 and is known for strong academics and research.
about: IIT Patna (est. 2008) is one of the fastest growing new IITs, jumping from NIRF 34 to 19 in 2025. Known for strong academics, research, innovation, and entrepreneurship. 501 UG and 270 PG students placed in 2024-25.

name: IIT Ropar
tagline: Rapidly growing IIT — strong research and innovation focus.
description: IIT Ropar is a rapidly growing new IIT established in 2008. Known for strong research output and innovation focus.
about: IIT Ropar (est. 2008) is a rapidly growing IIT with strong research and innovation focus. Known for good placement rates across branches and modern campus infrastructure.

name: IIT Gandhinagar
tagline: Liberal arts + engineering — unique foundation program.
description: IIT Gandhinagar is known for its unique foundation program and liberal arts approach to engineering education.
about: IIT Gandhinagar (est. 2008) is known for its unique foundation program blending liberal arts with engineering. Strong placement records with 90%+ CSE placement rate.

name: IIT Mandi
tagline: Himalayan IIT — most scenic new IIT campus.
description: IIT Mandi is nestled in the Himalayan foothills of Himachal Pradesh. Known for its breathtaking campus, strong research culture, and innovation rankings.
about: IIT Mandi (est. 2009) is located in the Himalayan foothills at Kamand, Himachal Pradesh. Known for its breathtaking campus, strong research culture, and NIRF Innovation Rank #10. NIRF Engineering Rank 26.

name: IIT Jodhpur
tagline: Desert city IIT — AI, digital humanities, and bioengineering pioneer.
description: IIT Jodhpur is a fast-growing new IIT in Rajasthan. Known for AI, digital humanities, bioengineering, and a sprawling 852-acre campus.
about: IIT Jodhpur (est. 2008) is located on NH-65, Nagaur Road, Karwar, Rajasthan. Known for AI, digital humanities, bioengineering, and a sprawling 852-acre campus. NIRF Engineering Rank 27 with 500+ offers in 2025.

labs.name: AI Lab
labs.description: Artificial intelligence and machine learning research

name: IIT Bhubaneswar
tagline: Gateway IIT for Eastern India — earth sciences and climate research hub.
description: IIT Bhubaneswar is the leading technical institution in Odisha. Known for its 936-acre permanent campus at Barunei Hill, earth sciences programs, and strong placement growth.
about: IIT Bhubaneswar (est. 2008) operates from its sprawling 936-acre permanent campus in Argul, Khordha, Odisha. Known for unique B.Tech in Earth, Ocean and Climate Sciences and strong placement growth. NIRF Engineering Rank 39.

name: IIT Tirupati
tagline: Fastest-growing 3rd-gen IIT — backed by IIT Madras mentorship.
description: IIT Tirupati is the fastest-growing 3rd-generation IIT, established in 2015 with mentorship from IIT Madras. Known for strong academics and growing placement records.
about: IIT Tirupati (est. 2015) is the fastest-growing 3rd-generation IIT with mentorship from IIT Madras. NIRF Engineering Rank 57. Strong placement growth with median package of Rs 15 LPA for UG students.

name: IIT Palakkad
tagline: Kerala's IIT — growing research and placement ecosystem.
description: IIT Palakkad is a 3rd-generation IIT established in 2015 in Kerala. Known for growing research output and improving placement records.
about: IIT Palakkad (est. 2015) is Kerala's IIT with a growing research and placement ecosystem. NIRF Engineering Rank 64. Campus is still under development with ongoing construction.

name: IIT Dharwad
tagline: Karnataka's newest IIT — rapidly improving infrastructure and placements.
description: IIT Dharwad is Karnataka's newest IIT, established in 2016. Known for rapidly improving infrastructure, strong academics, and growing placement records.
about: IIT Dharwad (est. 2016) is Karnataka's newest IIT with a 470-acre permanent campus. NIRF Engineering Rank 77. Strong placement growth with median package of Rs 13.25 LPA for UG students.

name: IIT Bhilai
tagline: Chhattisgarh's IIT — data science and AI focus with strong industry ties.
description: IIT Bhilai is Chhattisgarh's IIT, established in 2016. Known for data science, AI programs, and strong industry ties with improving placement records.
about: IIT Bhilai (est. 2016) is Chhattisgarh's IIT located in Kutelabhata, Durg. Known for data science and AI programs with strong industry ties. NIRF Engineering Rank 72. Median package Rs 12 LPA.

name: IIT Goa
tagline: Goa's IIT — beachside campus with growing tech ecosystem.
description: IIT Goa is Goa's IIT, established in 2016. Known for its beachside location, growing tech ecosystem, and improving placement records.
about: IIT Goa (est. 2016) is Goa's IIT with a growing tech ecosystem and improving placement records. Known for its beachside location and strong faculty mentorship.

name: IIT Jammu
tagline: J&K's IIT — strategic location with growing research focus.
description: IIT Jammu is Jammu and Kashmir's IIT, established in 2016. Known for its strategic location, growing research focus, and improving placement records.
about: IIT Jammu (est. 2016) is Jammu and Kashmir's IIT with a growing research focus and improving placement records. Known for its strategic location in the northern region.
